title: React Sliding Hover Grid Cards

statement.markdown:
## React Sliding Hover Grid Cards Component

Implement a card grid layout where hovering over any card reveals a background highlight block that slides smoothly and fades between cards.

### Requirements:
1. **Sliding Backdrop Highlight**: Implement an absolute backdrop element (with a colored border/background) that animates and slides between card coordinates smoothly as the user hovers from card to card.
2. **Hover State Tracking**: Use React state (`hoveredIndex`) to keep track of the currently active card index.
3. **Smooth Fade**: The highlight should fade in when entering the grid, and fade out smoothly when the mouse leaves the grid entirely.
4. **Layout**: Present the cards in a 3-column responsive grid layout using Tailwind CSS.

constraints: Must utilize React state and canvas lifecycle hooks

gradingCriteria.description: Verify that the interactive mouse tracking, scroll animations, or canvas draw loops work perfectly.
Verify clean React hook cleanups (setInterval, requestAnimationFrame, listeners) on component unmount.
